news.paragraph: Tesla is seeing conflicting signals as it expands its German battery cell investment and gains traction on AI developments, while simultaneously facing skepticism regarding its position in a potential Trump-led bull market. The stock has recently slipped ahead of a significant catalyst: Elon Musk's upcoming trip to China as part of a Trump trade delegation. This diplomatic engagement represents a key event that could impact near-term price volatility.
headlines: Market Chatter: Tesla Adds $250 Million to German Battery Cell Investment
Beware: Trump’s Bull Market Might Skip Tesla This Year
Tesla Surges on AI, Rivian Struggles to Stay Afloat
Tesla stock slips ahead of Musk's trip to China with Trump trade delegation
